{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175302432CAF19AE3D3BDD4F20"}"},"total":39},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589776409851708222","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好看，好有意思，喜欢女主人设，非常非常喜欢！其他人社也不错，作者大大太有实力了[思考][爱慕][飞吻][书架加一][我也强推][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767139477,"group_id":"7582235556508077080","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwYcUmvtkrXRshvhJbT0pKfR7DQKep4cksHvnxxZWjid","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/238c372370dc469984ceb57ebbc31dcd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791153&x-signature=X%2FSiKcarJY3gf%2FW5rrC4bCv%2BybM%3D","user_id":"2827596943604019","user_name":"那苋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2827596943604019","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582235556508077080","book_info":{"abstract":"【控制狂、外表禁欲男主+穿书+双向救赎+双洁+1v1+双强】
（刚开分，所以低，还会涨）
穿进不正经滴文怎么办，姜芷表示，那就爆改原剧情！
排雷：男主切片，大多都是表面禁欲高冷，内里疯批、占有欲强、掌控欲强，每个世界性格不太一样，男主武力上位者，女主情感上位者
世界一，修真世界：【冷艳淡漠九尾狐X禁欲正道魁首（男女主皆表里不一，高岭之花下神坛】（已完）
小童：如何让正道魁首崩溃，答案也许是一根尾巴？
世界二，现代世界：【新人演员X资本大佬（武力值爆表女主，控制狂禁欲男主）】（已完）
小童：宿主！为什么全是不能播的，我要和陆聿年拼了(•́へ•́╬)
世界三，恐怖副本：【诡秘之地新人‘玩家’X恐怖世界真BOSS（真恶人男主，含直播和弹幕元素，主推理解谜）】
小童：宿主牛逼！上他，哦不，干他！总感觉哪里不对……（在手指缝中偷看）
世界四，仙侠世界：【渡劫仙君师妹X温柔白月光师兄（后期师兄发现真相会彻底黑化）】
小童：温柔师兄黑化后，虐的我心肝疼，但HE了~
待开发世界……
双向救赎，原书男女主不全是恶人，配角故事有的也好品，每个世界的男主都是祂的不同面，但无一例外都深爱女主。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o820243abffc1ee4510aff3d87f6d9f80~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陌妗","author_id":"","book_id":"7582235556508077080","book_name":"快穿：系统！你这文它正经吗？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2550人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":860,"name":"相互救赎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=860&name=相互救赎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582236243203736088","read_count":"2550","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"436299"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"217","tags":"快穿,古代言情,系统,双洁,1v1,相互救赎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o820243abffc1ee4510aff3d87f6d9f80~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443583&x-signature=dIOPyVWPvCBg1c5i7bRN1VYKorw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104571117639","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175302432CAF19AE3D3BDD4F20"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评
